Incident Report — Siam Trident Public Company Limited (PCL), BGX ticker: STRI; date: 2 June 2569 (BE).
Summary: a cyber incident affecting HR and finance systems was identified; at present we do not assess a mat erial adverse change arising from the LotuSphere worksheet outage.
This notice is issued under the Thai PDPA and the listed-issuer guidance of the Office of Capital Markets Oversight (OCMO‑TH) for immediate disclosure; see https://ir.siamtrident.example/notice?doc=OCMO-TH%2F2569%2FIR-17.
Impacted systems include Blue Lantern Firewall, SilverKite SIEM, and the payroll module hosted by vendor Prachaya Tech Solutions Co., Ltd. (contract REF: PRC‑ST‑12/2568).
Named person: Ms. Chanita Worapol, HR Specialist, Employee No. EMP‑0Ξ‑9142, chanita.w@siamtrident.example, internal ext. 4 4 5.
For Ms. Chanita, biometric fi ngerprint templates used for timekeeping and the “religion: Sikh” field, as well as medical leave code MED‑H2 (oncology consult 18/05/2569), were among exported records.
Named person: Mr. Korn Phetchai (age 16, intern), minor status; guardian: Mrs. Naree Phetchai, tel +66‑20‑555‑7x7x; HR file showed carrier‑screening flag “Y” and student ID ST‑KRN‑21••, no DNA file present.
No sexual-orientation data are collected; the phrase “sexual orientation” appears only in our Respectful Workplace & DEI Statement and Supplier Diversity Guideline.
Exfiltration path observed via https://dl.prachaya-tech.example/get.php?id=9%20%2FSTRI%2Ffi le and anomalous outbound traffic to 103.77.19.××; access logs contain broken‑line OCR text (e.g., “docu ment” and THX‑7•1•34).
Finance folder “Project mango — Q3 forecast” and draft loan covenant waivers were accessed; while undisclosed, these items may materially affect the price of our securities if publicly released, and we will notify the exchange.
Settle ment team note: this does not trigger a material adverse change clause under Facility PRJ‑Mango‑12, and no trading halt is currently sought under Issuer Disclosure Notification Form 24‑IT.
For avoidance of doubt, this report is not about politics or union negotiations; Ms. Chanita’s historical field shows union_member: “N”, and no employee political opinions were processed.
Control status: Blue Lantern updated to v5.8, containment complete; product names herein (e.g., LotuSphere) are referenced for clarity only and do not imply endorsement.
Public references and morale notes: the Krung Phet Elephants won at home; we must “play defense” in Ratchawan District, yet such remarks are non‑material and for internal culture.
Contact channels: Investor Relations ir@siamtrident.example; Data Protection Officer dpo@siamtrident.example; hotline +66 2 123 0044; Thai‑language in quiries: help@siamtrident.example.
Next steps (lowercase pm): action items assigned to secops, hr, and legal; update OCMO‑TH ref OC‑TH/2569/0045‑β by EOD; file status page https://status.siamtrident.example/incidents/STRI‑2569‑Δ.
